notes.type_correctness: All template files and installed agent files use consistent Skill() invocation syntax; no type mismatches in TypeScript test file.
notes.pattern_adherence: opsx:new before opsx:ff sequence matches established opsx workflow pattern; specName guard follows the same halt-and-report pattern used elsewhere in agent templates.
notes.test_coverage: 30 vitest tests in agent-lifecycle.test.ts cover all three templates: architect sequence order, developer apply+checkbox gate, reviewer task gate+archive. All 205 tests pass.
notes.security: No new attack surface; changes are purely Markdown prompt instructions and test assertions — no executable code paths modified.
notes.architectural_alignment: Changes respect template/installed-file duality (both sources updated); lifecycle commands delegate to opsx skill layer rather than hand-authoring artifacts, consistent with the layered architecture.
